column4: Incense or a sweet-smelling offering that rises to heaven, symbolizing the prayers of the faithful ascending before God's throne in worship and intercession.
Sacred service or liturgical action performed by priests in the temple, representing the holy work of worship and sanctification offered to God.
The final things or end times, revealing God's ultimate plan for creation and the fulfillment of His kingdom when Christ returns in glory.
Instruction or catechetical teaching that transmits the faith of the Church, forming believers in the doctrines and practices essential to Christian life.
